item.title: This Movie Is So Bad, It’s Almost Charming
item.description: A playful take on a movie that’s so bad it becomes oddly entertaining.

media:content.media:title: This Movie Is So Bad, It’s Almost Charming
media:content.media:description: A playful take on a movie that’s so bad it becomes oddly entertaining.

item.title: Catching Up With Dhar Mann
item.description: A quick catch-up with Dhar Mann, keeping it simple and to the point.

item.title: Anyone But You: The RomCom That Tried Its Best
item.description: A playful take on Anyone But You and why it’s being called a rom-com that missed the mark.

media:content.media:title: Anyone But You: The RomCom That Tried Its Best
media:content.media:description: A playful take on Anyone But You and why it’s being called a rom-com that missed the mark.
